description: White bra made of cotton elastane stretch fabric, providing superior comfort and flexibility Delightful lace trim that sits perfectly on the neckline Full coverage bra contours your curves, ideal to wear with figure hugging clothes 3 section cup gives complete support & excellent fit Soft, narrow adjustable straps rest comfortably on shoulders & leave no marks on your skinBroad and adjustable double hook closure at the back Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
